Package main.services

Class DiscoveryServices

java.lang.Object
main.services.Service
main.services.DiscoveryServices
All Implemented Interfaces:
IStatusProvider, ICSLService
public class DiscoveryServices extends Service implements ICSLService, IStatusProvider
Service in charge of the SNMP manager microservice. It should expose an API to request a scan and fetch the database. It also allows to know the current status of the requested scans.

      public boolean init(Json jConfig, String cslDir)
      Initialize the service, setting the list of known managers and registering the commands.
      Specified by:
      init in interface ICSLService
      Specified by:
      init in class Service
      Parameters:
      jConfig - The configuration of the service (that is, the relevant section of the config file)

      Returns:
      True is the initialization was successful, false otherwise

    • getAllCpes

      public List<CpeItem> getAllCpes()
      Get all the detected SNMP objects found.
      Returns:
      A Json array containing all the SNMP objects discovered so far by the scanner.

    • startScan

      public JsonApiResponse startScan(List<String> entities)
      Synchronize devices between DB-API and CSL-Scan, and then request a new scan from DB-API.
      Parameters:
      entities - The entities' uuids to scan. May be null, in which case all entities are scanned.
      Returns:
      The result of the scan request, in a JsonApiResponse
